handlers.name: ChargeHandler
handlers.description: Handles mounted/cavalry charge attacks. Actor charges through enemies to a destination tile past the target.

functions.name: CanBeUsed
functions.description: Validates charge ability availability. Checks actor exists, can act, is not rooted. Searches tiles within Range for valid targets.

functions.name: IsHidden
functions.description: Returns true if actor cannot act OR if HideWhenUnusable is true and charge cannot be used by player-controlled units.

functions.name: IsUsable
functions.description: Similar to CanBeUsed but returns different result type. Checks rooting status and valid targets.

functions.name: OnTileChanged
functions.description: Called when entering a tile during charge. Applies skill damage to enemy actors on tiles passed through.

functions.name: OnUse
functions.description: Executes charge attack. Moves actor to tile past target with MoveToWithSkill flag 5. Shows notification on failure for player.

functions.name: OnVerifyTarget
functions.description: Validates charge target. Checks enemy visibility, destination validity, clear path, diagonal adjacency requirements.

handler_fields.name: skill
handler_fields.description: Reference to the parent Skill object. Used to apply effects and get actor.

handler_fields.name: effectData
handler_fields.description: Reference to the Charge ScriptableObject containing effect configuration data.

effect_data_fields.name: HideWhenUnusable
effect_data_fields.description: If true, hides the charge ability from player UI when it cannot be used (no valid targets).

effect_data_fields.name: Range
effect_data_fields.description: Maximum tile distance to search for valid charge targets. Used in CanBeUsed/IsUsable to define search area.

handlers.name: ChargeInfantryHandler
handlers.description: Handles infantry charge attacks. Similar to ChargeHandler but with additional mounted check and applies skill to enemies hit.

functions.name: CanBeUsed
functions.description: Infantry-specific charge validation. Same as ChargeHandler but also checks IsMounted flag - infantry cannot charge while mounted.

functions.name: IsHidden
functions.description: Returns visibility state. Uses HideWhenUnusable at offset 0x60 (different from ChargeHandler's 0x58).

functions.name: IsUsable
functions.description: Checks if infantry charge is usable based on mounted status and valid targets.

functions.name: OnDetermineFinalUserTile
functions.description: Calculates destination tile for charge - returns tile adjacent to target in charge direction.

functions.name: OnTileChanged
functions.description: Called when entering tile during charge. Creates skill from OnHitSkillTemplate and adds to enemy's SkillContainer.

functions.name: OnUse
functions.description: Infantry charge execution. Moves to tile adjacent to target, calls OnTileChanged to apply hit effects.

functions.name: OnVerifyTarget
functions.description: Infantry charge target validation. Same as ChargeHandler but also checks AnyHalfCoversCrossed to block charges through half cover.

handler_fields.name: skill
handler_fields.description: Reference to the parent Skill object.

handler_fields.name: effectData
handler_fields.description: Reference to the ChargeInfantry ScriptableObject containing effect configuration.

effect_data_fields.name: OnHitSkillTemplate
effect_data_fields.description: Skill template applied to enemies hit during the charge. Created via SkillTemplate.CreateSkill and added to enemy.

effect_data_fields.name: HideWhenUnusable
effect_data_fields.description: If true, hides the charge ability from player UI when it cannot be used.

effect_data_fields.name: Range
effect_data_fields.description: Maximum tile distance for charge target search (inherited from BaseEffect).

factory_methods.name: Charge.Create
factory_methods.description: Factory that creates ChargeHandler instance. Allocates handler, initializes base, stores effect data at offset 0x18.

factory_methods.name: ChargeInfantry.Create
factory_methods.description: Factory that creates ChargeInfantryHandler instance. Same pattern as Charge.Create.

key_discoveries.finding: Both handlers inherit from SkillEventHandler with Skill reference at 0x10 and effect data at 0x18. Effect data is a ScriptableObject with configuration.
Charges use MoveToWithSkill with flag 5 (charge movement type). Flag 4 is added if actor is facing opposite direction of charge. Flag 8 in result indicates skill should be applied.
ChargeInfantryHandler adds IsMounted check (EntityProperties offset 0xec bit 2) preventing infantry from charging while mounted. Also checks AnyHalfCoversCrossed to block charges through half cover.

OnVerifyTarget validates: 1) Target has visible enemy actor, 2) Destination tile (past target) is valid movement destination, 3) Path is clear (uses walkability array at actor.movement.0x58), 4) Line of sight exists, 5) Diagonal moves require adjacent tiles empty.
ChargeHandler applies skill directly via Skill.ApplyToTile. ChargeInfantryHandler creates new skill instance from OnHitSkillTemplate and adds to enemy's SkillContainer - allows different effects.

HideWhenUnusable flag controls UI visibility. When true for player units, CanBeUsed is called and result is inverted to determine hidden state. Different offsets: 0x58 for Charge, 0x60 for ChargeInfantry.
Actor movement component at offset 0x2b0 contains walkability data. The walkability array at 0x58 within movement data is used for pathfinding validation. Array size at 0x18, data at 0x20+.
Uses 8-direction system (0-7). Diagonal directions have odd values. DirectionExtensions.Flip reverses direction. GetNextTile retrieves adjacent tile in direction.

Tile.offset_0x1c: Flags byte (bit 0: blocked, bit 3: fog of war)
Tile.offset_0x48: Tile index (uint) - used for walkability lookup

EntityProperties.offset_0xec: Status flags (bit 2: IsMounted, IsRooted checked separately)
